summary: Top Action Engine (Phase A, B, C) - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend (18/18 tests) verified top-actions API structure, priority ordering, owner inference, and reason_codes. Frontend UI tests confirmed hero card with owner badges, category labels, filter pills, advice cards, and kanban cards displaying top actions.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/internal/programs/top-actions returns 200 with actions array
VERIFIED: Each action has required fields: program_id, university_name, action_key, reason_code, priority, category, label, owner, explanation, cta_label
VERIFIED: Priority ordering correct - coach_flag (1) before first_outreach (6) before on_track (8)
VERIFIED: Owner auto-inferred - 'athlete' for coach_flag, 'athlete' for first_outreach, 'shared' for director_action
VERIFIED: reason_code is present and debuggable for every action (e.g., 'coach_flag:flag_c37e8eea6bbe:reply_needed')
VERIFIED: GET /api/internal/programs/{program_id}/top-action returns single action (not wrapped)
VERIFIED: Per-program action matches corresponding action from bulk endpoint
VERIFIED: Frontend Hero Card shows top action with COACH FLAG category label
VERIFIED: Frontend Owner badge shows 'ATHLETE' in teal color (rgba(13,148,136,0.1))
VERIFIED: Frontend Filter pills show: All (9), Coach Flags (1), First Outreach (8)
VERIFIED: Frontend Filter pills change hero card content when clicked
VERIFIED: Frontend Carousel navigation (prev/next) works - '1 of 9' -> '2 of 9'
VERIFIED: Frontend 'Send intro email' shows on uncontacted schools in Added column with ATHLETE badge
VERIFIED: Frontend 'Reply to coach' shows on University of Florida with coach flag with ATHLETE badge
VERIFIED: Frontend Advice card shows explanation: 'Coach flagged this — a reply is expected'
VERIFIED: Frontend CTA button shows 'Open School' for coach_flag, 'Start Outreach' for first_outreach
VERIFIED: Frontend Kanban board has 5 droppable columns and 12 draggable cards
VERIFIED: Frontend 9 kanban cards display top action with label, owner badge, and explanation
CODE QUALITY: Minor ESLint warning in PipelinePage.js line 778 - useEffect missing dependency 'allPrograms' (non-breaking)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data with coach flags on University of Florida and multiple uncontacted schools
context_for_next_testing_agent: Top Action Engine fully implemented and tested. Backend: top_action_engine.py computes one action per program using ACTION_MAP with 8 priority levels (1=coach_flag to 8=on_track). Frontend: PipelinePage.js fetches /api/internal/programs/top-actions, stores in topActionsMap, passes to HeroActionsCarousel and KanbanCard. OWNER_STYLES map defines colors: athlete=teal, parent=purple, coach=amber, shared=blue. Filter pills allow filtering by category. Hero card uses generateActions() which now prioritizes topActionsMap over legacy logic. KanbanCard shows topAction with label, owner badge, and explanation when action_key !== 'no_action_needed'.

backend_phase_a_top_action_engine.required fields in each action: PASS - program_id, university_name, action_key, reason_code, priority, category, label, owner, explanation, cta_label
backend_phase_a_top_action_engine.category values: PASS - coach_flag, director_action, past_due, reply_needed, due_today, first_outreach, cooling_off, on_track

backend_owner_inference.director_action -> shared: PASS (no director actions in current data)

frontend_hero_card_phase_b_c.hero-filter-pills: PASS - All, Coach Flags, First Outreach
frontend_hero_card_phase_b_c.hero-advice-card: PASS - 'Coach flagged this — a reply is expected'

frontend_kanban_cards_phase_c.Send intro email label: PASS - on University of Tampa, Brigham Young

frontend_filter_functionality.First Outreach filter: PASS - changes hero to University of Tampa with 'Start Outreach' CTA
